overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior riding a horse through a misty forest that opens into a vast field of white pampas grass. The camera follows the character in third-person as they transition from a narrow wooded trail to an open grassland path, eventually leaving the trail to ride through the deep grass toward the tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall trees

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady pace through narrow forest trail with dense trees and undergrowth on both sides

entered.detail: tall thin tree trunks forming dense forest canopy on both sides of path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest floor
thick green underbrush and grass lining the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense, misty forest with a narrow dirt trail winding between tall trees. The samurai rides forward through the enclosed space with soft diffused light filtering through the canopy, surrounded by lush green undergrowth.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland field with white pampas grass

events.description: exits dense forest into expansive open field filled with tall white pampas grass

agents.ego_description: continuing along path as environment opens to wide grassland with white pampas grass swaying in the wind

entered.detail: tall white flowering grass covering the open field on both sides of the path
distant line of trees marking the edge of the open field

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a vast, misty field filled with tall white pampas grass. The path continues straight through the grassland as the sky becomes fully visible and the lighting brightens, revealing distant tree lines on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty grassland path with distant tree lines

events.description: passing a traditional wooden lantern post beside the path

agents.ego_description: riding along the dirt path through the expansive white grass field, passing a wooden lantern marker

entered.detail: traditional black wooden lantern post with white paper panels beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The samurai rides along the established path through the deep white grass, passing a traditional wooden lantern post. The field stretches wide with distant tree lines visible through the morning mist, and the grass grows denser along the trail edges.

events.description: leaving the dirt path to ride directly through the tall white grass toward the trees

agents.ego_description: turning off the main path to ride through the deep white grass toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: dense tree line approaching as the horse leaves the trail

segments.scene_description: The horse turns off the path and plunges into the deep white grass, heading toward the forest edge. The camera follows as the samurai leaves the trail to explore the tall grass field, with trees closing in on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, misty forest into a vast, open expanse of white pampas grass. It begins on a narrow dirt trail winding through tall trees and lush green undergrowth, where soft diffused light filters through a dense canopy. As the forest opens up, the scene expands into a wide grassland under a brightening sky, with the path continuing straight toward distant tree lines visible through the morning mist. The camera then follows the samurai past a traditional wooden lantern post as the white grass grows denser along the trail edges. Finally, the horse turns off the established path and plunges into the deep grass, moving away from the trail and toward the closing tree line.
